title: ChatContactQueryInput.sort_property is Option<&str> — stringly typed, needs SortProperty enum
description: sort_property: Option<&'a str> with doc comment 'one of: lastSeenAt, login, lastActiveAt'. A typo or casing mistake is a silent runtime bug. The right type is a new enum SortProperty { LastSeenAt, Login, LastActiveAt } with #[non_exhaustive] so future sort properties don't break match arms. This is exactly what enums are for — making invalid values unrepresentable. The input struct is part of the public API and will fossilize.
